topics.name: Headache
home_remedies: Rest in a quiet, dark room
Apply a cold or warm compress to the head or neck
when_to_see_doctor: The headache is sudden and severe (thunderclap headache)
Accompanied by fever, stiff neck, confusion, or vision changes

topics.name: Common Cold
home_remedies: Stay hydrated with water, clear broths, or warm lemon water
Gargle with warm salt water for a sore throat
Use a humidifier to add moisture to the air
when_to_see_doctor: Shortness of breath or chest pain

topics.name: Fever
home_remedies: Drink plenty of fluids to prevent dehydration
Rest to help the body recover
when_to_see_doctor: Accompanied by a severe headache, rash, or difficulty breathing

topics.name: Stomach Ache
home_remedies: Drink clear liquids like water or chamomile tea
Eat bland foods like crackers, toast, or bananas (BRAT diet)
Avoid dairy, caffeine, and spicy or greasy foods
Use a heating pad on your belly
when_to_see_doctor: Pain is severe, sudden, or localized (like the lower right side)
Accompanied by persistent vomiting or inability to keep liquids down
